title: Marvel Craft
body:
**_DISCLAIMER, I HAVE LOST THE FILE FOR THIS MOD, IT CANNOT RECIEVE UPDATES_**

Marvel Craft is a new type of superhero mod, it focuses on making ingots fuse together and making new elements. 

**GETTING STARTED**

In order to get started you must find titanium. found in stone, this ore is used for the beginning of the mod, so mine it up for later once you see it!

![Titanium in a cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14f2107a0c42a41edf6b5aeae7488292b6e0d286.png)

However, you can't smelt down titanium normally, you must craft an Industrial Furnace in order to smelt, crafted like this:
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/795317619d8e6ed4891fba60f8fb6a9fbfafc930.png)

After this you smelt down the titanium, afterwards, craft a Titanium Industrial Furnace to start fusing ores.

Hope you enjoy this new take on superhero mods!

JEI IS HIGHLY RECOMMENDED
